slices of seared meat with browned crust and pink interior
white rectangular cutting board with food residue
single piece of seared meat
silver knife blade
white tiled countertop

atomic_facts.fact: Slices of seared meat are arranged on top of a bed of creamy risotto on a white plate.
A single piece of cooked meat rests on a white cutting board.
A knife is partially visible on the cutting board.
The plate is positioned on the tiled countertop below the cutting board.

spatial: The white plate containing the food is in the foreground, positioned below and to the left of the white cutting board. The cutting board is in the background on the upper right side of the frame. The single piece of meat is on the cutting board, while the sliced meat is on the plate.
